# nge-ide

## Documentation

- [Introduction](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/introduction)
- [Getting started](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/getting-started)
- [File system](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/file-system)
- [Editors](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/editors)
- [Extending the IDE](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/extending)
- [Theming](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/theming)
- [Services reference](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/services)
- [API reference](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api)
- [emptySearchForm](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/functions/emptySearchForm)
- [fileSystemProviderCapabilityName](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/functions/fileSystemProviderCapabilityName): Gets a human readable name of the given `capability`
- [hasKeycode](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/functions/hasKeycode): Checks if an event has any of the provided
- [hasModifierKey](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/functions/hasModifierKey): Checks whether a modifier key is pressed.
- [stringFromByArray](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/functions/stringFromByArray)
- [stringToByteArray](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/functions/stringToByteArray)
- [BadgeComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/BadgeComponent): Projects arbitrary content and overlays a small count bubble at its
- [BinarySize](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/BinarySize)
- [CheckboxComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/CheckboxComponent): A compact, VS-Code-like checkbox built on a native `<input type="checkbox">`.
- [CodeEditor](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/CodeEditor): Represents an editor that is attached to a component.
- [CodeEditorComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/CodeEditorComponent)
- [CodeEditorModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/CodeEditorModule)
- [CommandEvent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/CommandEvent)
- [CommandGroupComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/CommandGroupComponent)
- [CommandModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/CommandModule)
- [CommandService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/CommandService)
- [ContextMenuService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ContextMenuService): Opens a menu at the pointer position, on top of `@angular/cdk`.
- [Contribution](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/Contribution)
- [CoreModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/CoreModule)
- [DiagnosticService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/DiagnosticService)
- [DialogModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/DialogModule)
- [DialogService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/DialogService)
- [DividerComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/DividerComponent): A thin rule that separates content, laid out horizontally (default) or
- [DndDirective](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/DndDirective): Element that can share or accept a data of dragged dom element.
- [Editor](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/Editor): Represents an editor that is attached to a component.
- [EditorContribution](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/EditorContribution)
- [EditorDirective](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/EditorDirective)
- [EditorDirectivesModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/EditorDirectivesModule)
- [EditorGroup](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/EditorGroup): Represents an editor group.
- [EditorModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/EditorModule)
- [EditorPipesModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/EditorPipesModule)
- [EditorService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/EditorService)
- [ErrorNotification](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ErrorNotification)
- [ExplorerCommandCollapseAll](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerCommandCollapseAll)
- [ExplorerCommandCopy](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerCommandCopy): Commands available inside the explorer container.
- [ExplorerCommandCopyPath](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerCommandCopyPath): Commands available inside the explorer container.
- [ExplorerCommandCreateFile](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerCommandCreateFile): Commands available inside the explorer container.
- [ExplorerCommandCreateFolder](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerCommandCreateFolder): Commands available inside the explorer container.
- [ExplorerCommandDelete](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerCommandDelete): Commands available inside the explorer container.
- [ExplorerCommandFileExport](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerCommandFileExport): Commands available inside the explorer container.
- [ExplorerCommandFileUpload](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerCommandFileUpload): Commands available inside the explorer container.
- [ExplorerCommandPaste](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerCommandPaste): Commands available inside the explorer container.
- [ExplorerCommandRefresh](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerCommandRefresh): Command that refresh the explorer file tree.
- [ExplorerCommandRename](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerCommandRename): Commands available inside the explorer container.
- [ExplorerCommandToggleFiltering](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerCommandToggleFiltering)
- [ExplorerComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerComponent)
- [ExplorerContribution](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerContribution)
- [ExplorerModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerModule)
- [ExplorerService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ExplorerService): Provides an API to interact with the explorer view tree.
- [FileChangedPipe](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/FileChangedPipe)
- [FileNamePipe](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/FileNamePipe)
- [FileService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/FileService)
- [FileSystemError](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/FileSystemError): A type that filesystem providers should use to signal errors.
- [FileSystemProvider](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/FileSystemProvider): The filesystem provider defines what the editor needs to read, write, discover,
- [HighlightDirective](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/HighlightDirective)
- [HtmlPreviewHandler](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/HtmlPreviewHandler)
- [IdeAutocompleteComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeAutocompleteComponent): Floating list of `<ide-auto-option>` items shown under an input by the
- [IdeAutocompleteDirective](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeAutocompleteDirective): Trigger that binds a native `<input>` (or `<textarea>`) to an
- [IdeAutoOptionComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeAutoOptionComponent): A single selectable row inside an `<ide-autocomplete>` panel.
- [IdeButtonDirective](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeButtonDirective): Styling primitive that replaces ng-zorro's `nz-button`.
- [IdeComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeComponent)
- [IdeInputDirective](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeInputDirective): Styling primitive that replaces ng-zorro's `nz-input`.
- [IdeMenuComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeMenuComponent): Menu panel that lays out a list of IdeMenuItemDirective entries.
- [IdeMenuItemDirective](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeMenuItemDirective): A single entry inside an IdeMenuComponent.
- [IdeMenuTriggerDirective](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeMenuTriggerDirective): Turns its host element into a click trigger that opens an
- [IdeModalContainerComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeModalContainerComponent): Presentational container rendered inside the CDK dialog overlay. It lays out
- [IdeModalRef](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeModalRef): Handle to a modal opened through `IdeModalService`. Wraps the CDK `DialogRef`
- [IdeModalService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeModalService): Injectable, VS-Code-like modal service built on `@angular/cdk/dialog`. It is a
- [IdeService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/IdeService)
- [InfobarComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/InfobarComponent)
- [InfobarContainer](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/InfobarContainer): Representation of view container inside the infobar area.
- [InfobarModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/InfobarModule)
- [InfoNotification](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/InfoNotification)
- [Keybinding](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/Keybinding)
- [KeyBindService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/KeyBindService)
- [MarkdownPreviewHandler](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/MarkdownPreviewHandler)
- [MediaEditor](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/MediaEditor): Represents an editor that is attached to a component.
- [MediaEditorComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/MediaEditorComponent)
- [MediaEditorModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/MediaEditorModule)
- [MemFileProvider](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/MemFileProvider): The filesystem provider defines what the editor needs to read, write, discover,
- [MonacoService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/MonacoService)
- [NgeIdeExplorerModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/NgeIdeExplorerModule)
- [NgeIdeModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/NgeIdeModule)
- [NgeIdeNotificationsModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/NgeIdeNotificationsModule)
- [NgeIdeProblemsModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/NgeIdeProblemsModule)
- [NgeIdeSearchModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/NgeIdeSearchModule)
- [NgeIdeSettingsModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/NgeIdeSettingsModule)
- [NicifyNamePipe](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/NicifyNamePipe)
- [NotificationsComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/NotificationsComponent)
- [NotificationService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/NotificationService)
- [NotificationsModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/NotificationsModule)
- [OpenRequest](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/OpenRequest): Represents file open request.
- [OptionComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/OptionComponent): A single choice inside an SelectComponent (`ide-select`).
- [Paths](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/Paths)
- [PreviewEditor](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/PreviewEditor): Represents an editor that is attached to a component.
- [PreviewEditorComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/PreviewEditorComponent)
- [PreviewEditorModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/PreviewEditorModule)
- [PreviewService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/PreviewService)
- [ProblemsComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ProblemsComponent)
- [ProblemsModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ProblemsModule)
- [QuickOpenComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/QuickOpenComponent)
- [QuickOpenModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/QuickOpenModule)
- [SearchComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SearchComponent)
- [SearchInputComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SearchInputComponent)
- [SearchModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SearchModule)
- [SelectComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SelectComponent): A compact, VS-Code-like single-select dropdown.
- [SettingsEditorComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SettingsEditorComponent)
- [SettingsEditorModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SettingsEditorModule)
- [SettingsService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SettingsService)
- [SidebarComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SidebarComponent): Renders on the sidebar area of the ide.
- [SidebarContainer](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SidebarContainer): Representation of view container inside the sidebar area.
- [SidebarModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SidebarModule)
- [SkeletonComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SkeletonComponent): Lightweight loading placeholder rendering a few content lines with an
- [SpinnerComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SpinnerComponent): Indeterminate loading spinner. Standalone, pure-CSS replacement for
- [StatusbarComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/StatusbarComponent)
- [StatusbarModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/StatusbarModule)
- [StatusBarService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/StatusBarService)
- [StorageService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/StorageService)
- [SvgPreviewHandler](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/SvgPreviewHandler)
- [TabButtonDirective](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/TabButtonDirective): Internal directive applied to every tab header rendered by
- [TabComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/TabComponent): A single tab hosted by TabsComponent. Standalone replacement for
- [TabsComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/TabsComponent): Card-style (or line-style) tab bar. Standalone replacement for ng-zorro's
- [TaskbarComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/TaskbarComponent)
- [TaskbarModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/TaskbarModule)
- [TaskService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/TaskService)
- [ThemeService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ThemeService): Owns the IDE's color theme.
- [ThemeSidebarContainer](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ThemeSidebarContainer): Activity-bar (bottom) entry offering Light / Dark / System. The title is a
- [ToggleThemeCommand](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ToggleThemeCommand): Command-palette entry that cycles the color theme (light -> dark -> system).
- [ToolbarButton](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ToolbarButton)
- [ToolbarComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ToolbarComponent)
- [ToolbarModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ToolbarModule)
- [ToolbarSeparator](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ToolbarSeparator)
- [ToolbarService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ToolbarService)
- [TooltipComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/TooltipComponent): The floating bubble rendered by TooltipDirective.
- [TooltipDirective](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/TooltipDirective): Attribute directive that shows a compact, VS-Code-like tooltip on hover and on
- [ViewContainerService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ViewContainerService)
- [ViewDirective](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ViewDirective)
- [ViewGroupComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ViewGroupComponent)
- [ViewModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ViewModule)
- [ViewService](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/ViewService)
- [WarningNotification](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/WarningNotification)
- [WorkbenchComponent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/WorkbenchComponent)
- [WorkbenchModule](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/classes/WorkbenchModule)
- [ConfirmOptions](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/ConfirmOptions)
- [Diagnostic](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/Diagnostic): Represents a diagnostic, such as a compiler error or warning.
- [DiagnosticGroup](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/DiagnosticGroup)
- [DndData](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/DndData): Representation of a data shared with a drag and drop action.
- [EditorState](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/EditorState): Represents the state of the editor.
- [EditorTab](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/EditorTab)
- [FileNestingPattern](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/FileNestingPattern)
- [ICommand](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/ICommand)
- [IContribution](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IContribution)
- [IdeAutoOptionSelectionEvent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IdeAutoOptionSelectionEvent): Payload emitted when an option is chosen.
- [IdeContextMenuConfig](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IdeContextMenuConfig): Options accepted by ContextMenuService.open.
- [IdeModalButton](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IdeModalButton): Declarative footer button of a modal, mirroring the plain objects the IDE
- [IdeModalContainerData](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IdeModalContainerData): Normalized data handed to `IdeModalContainerComponent` through `DIALOG_DATA`.
- [IdeModalOptions](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IdeModalOptions): Options accepted by `IdeModalService.create`/`open`. Each field is the plain
- [IExplorerCommand](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IExplorerCommand): Commands available inside the explorer container.
- [IFile](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IFile): Representation of a file/directory.
- [IFileChange](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IFileChange): Identifies a single change in a file.
- [IFileSystemProvider](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IFileSystemProvider): The filesystem provider defines what the editor needs to read, write, discover,
- [IStatusBarItem](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IStatusBarItem)
- [ITask](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/ITask)
- [IToolbarButton](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IToolbarButton)
- [IToolbarCustomGroup](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IToolbarCustomGroup)
- [IToolbarItem](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IToolbarItem)
- [IView](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IView): Representation of a part of the editor (statusbar, sidebar...).
- [IViewContainer](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/IViewContainer): Representation of view container inside the infobar area.
- [Notification](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/Notification)
- [OpenOptions](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/OpenOptions): Represents file open options.
- [Preview](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/Preview)
- [PreviewHandler](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/PreviewHandler)
- [SearchForm](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/SearchForm)
- [SearchMatch](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/SearchMatch)
- [SearchResult](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/interfaces/SearchResult)
- [IdeButtonSize](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/type-aliases/IdeButtonSize): Height/padding scale of an `[ideButton]` (replaces ng-zorro's `nzSize`).
- [IdeButtonType](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/type-aliases/IdeButtonType): Visual style of an `[ideButton]` (replaces ng-zorro's `nzType`).
- [IdeContextMenuContent](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/type-aliases/IdeContextMenuContent): A menu source: a bare `TemplateRef`, or an object that carries one.
- [IdeModalButtonType](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/type-aliases/IdeModalButtonType): Visual style of an IdeModalButton (replaces ng-zorro's button `nzType`).
- [IdeSpinnerSize](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/type-aliases/IdeSpinnerSize): Diameter preset for SpinnerComponent.
- [IdeTabsType](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/type-aliases/IdeTabsType): Visual style of the tab bar (renamed from ng-zorro's `nzType`).
- [NotificationLevel](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/type-aliases/NotificationLevel)
- [ResolvedTheme](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/type-aliases/ResolvedTheme)
- [ThemeMode](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/type-aliases/ThemeMode)
- [CONTRIBUTION](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/CONTRIBUTION)
- [DEFAULT_STORAGE_PREFIX](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/DEFAULT_STORAGE_PREFIX): Namespace applied to every stored key when STORAGE_PREFIX is not provided.
- [DndDataTransfer](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/DndDataTransfer): Data passed to dataTransfer.setData method when a data is dragged using DndDirective.
- [EXPLORER_COMMAND_COLLAPSE](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_COMMAND_COLLAPSE)
- [EXPLORER_COMMAND_COPY](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_COMMAND_COPY)
- [EXPLORER_COMMAND_COPY_PATH](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_COMMAND_COPY_PATH)
- [EXPLORER_COMMAND_CREATE_FILE](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_COMMAND_CREATE_FILE)
- [EXPLORER_COMMAND_CREATE_FOLDER](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_COMMAND_CREATE_FOLDER)
- [EXPLORER_COMMAND_DELETE](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_COMMAND_DELETE)
- [EXPLORER_COMMAND_FILE_EXPORT](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_COMMAND_FILE_EXPORT)
- [EXPLORER_COMMAND_FILE_UPLOAD](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_COMMAND_FILE_UPLOAD)
- [EXPLORER_COMMAND_PASTE](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_COMMAND_PASTE)
- [EXPLORER_COMMAND_REFRESH](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_COMMAND_REFRESH)
- [EXPLORER_COMMAND_RENAME](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_COMMAND_RENAME)
- [EXPLORER_COMMAND_TOGGLE_FILTERING](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_COMMAND_TOGGLE_FILTERING)
- [EXPLORER_CONTAINER_ID](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_CONTAINER_ID): Identifier of the explorer container.
- [EXPLORER_VIEW_ID](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/EXPLORER_VIEW_ID): Identifier of the explorer view component.
- [IDE_MENU_DIRECTIVES](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/IDE_MENU_DIRECTIVES): Every menu directive/component, for a single-line `imports` entry.
- [IDE_THEME_CSS](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/IDE_THEME_CSS): IDE theme tokens (GitHub Light + GitHub Dark), bundled as a string and
- [KeyCodes](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/KeyCodes)
- [KeyModifiers](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/KeyModifiers)
- [NOTIFICATION_EVENT_CHANNEL](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/NOTIFICATION_EVENT_CHANNEL)
- [NOTIFICATIONS_CONTAINER_ID](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/NOTIFICATIONS_CONTAINER_ID): Identifier of the notifications container.
- [NOTIFICATIONS_VIEW_ID](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/NOTIFICATIONS_VIEW_ID): Identifier of the notifications view component.
- [PROBLEMS_CONTAINER_ID](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/PROBLEMS_CONTAINER_ID): Identifier of the problems container.
- [PROBLEMS_VIEW_ID](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/PROBLEMS_VIEW_ID): Identifier of the problems view component.
- [SEARCH_CONTAINER_ID](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/SEARCH_CONTAINER_ID): Identifier of the search container.
- [SEARCH_VIEW_ID](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/SEARCH_VIEW_ID): Identifier of the search view component.
- [SETTINGS_CONTAINER_ID](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/SETTINGS_CONTAINER_ID): Identifier of the settings container.
- [SETTINGS_URI](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/SETTINGS_URI)
- [STORAGE_PREFIX](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/STORAGE_PREFIX)
- [THEME_CONTAINER_ID](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/THEME_CONTAINER_ID)
- [TOGGLE_THEME_COMMAND](https://cisstech.github.io/nge-ide/docs/api/variables/TOGGLE_THEME_COMMAND)
